<<THE RESEARCH ASSISTANT IS DESIGNING AN EXPERIMENT TO TEST THE EFFECTIVENESS OF A NEW DRUG ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE>>  

1. THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS (MLEs) FOR THE PARAMETERS MU_X, MU_Y, SIGMA_X², SIGMA_Y², AND SIGMA_XY ARE DERIVED AS FOLLOWS:  

<<THE MLE FOR MU_X IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES>>  
<<THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS THE SAMPLE MEAN OF THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES>>  
<<THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X² IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES>>  
<<THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y² IS THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES>>  
<<THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN THE PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES>>  

2. TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE, THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG HAS NO EFFECT, AND THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG DOES HAVE AN EFFECT. THE TEST STATISTIC IS THE ESTIMATED COVARIANCE BETWEEN THE PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES. THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS THAT IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF 0.05, THEN THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS REJECTED. THE TEST STATISTIC IS CALCULATED USING THE MLEs FOR SIGMA_XY, SIGMA_X², AND SIGMA_Y². THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS THAT IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE CRITICAL VALUE AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF 0.05, THEN THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS REJECTED. THE TEST STATISTIC IS CALCULATED USING THE MLEs FOR SIGMA_XY, SIGMA_X², AND SIGMA_Y².
